prestazioni: LS2 6.0L V8 (L77/L98 engine code) forced induction upgrade using a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit with a custom 3.5" pulley, supporting 10 psi of boost, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping to handle E85 fuel blends

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox with a custom bellhousing adapter, upgraded driveshafts with CV joints from a HSV W427, and a Harrop diff cover with a 3.73:1 ratio LSD for improved torque transfer

Custom cooling system overhaul featuring a PWR radiator with dual 14" SPAL fans, a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump, and a Setrab 50-row oil cooler with AN-10 fittings to maintain optimal temperatures under sustained high-load conditions
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a modified HSV Clubsport R8 front bumper with integrated DRLs, paired with a Statesman-specific Rocket Bunny-inspired rear overfender kit, extending the rear track by 3 inches for aggressive stance

Custom 22" staggered Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (9.5" front, 11.5" rear) with a concave lip design, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/30 front, 305/25 rear) for maximum grip and visual impact

Full custom interior reupholstery featuring Recaro Pole Position seats with Alcantara and red stitching, a custom roll cage integrated into the rear seat structure for chassis rigidity, and a full carbon fiber dash overlay with a Motec C127 digital dash display
